Session Token

Execute Server Command

/give <guid> <propId> <amount> — Give item
/givemail <guid> <propId> <amount> — Send via mail
/resources <guid> — Set to 900M resources

Server Logs

Select a log source and click Refresh

Send Command Item

Use the Commands tab to run /give or /givemail with any prop ID.
